_description: End-to-end Phase 15 verification fixture. Proves PIPE-01 through PIPE-05 in a single pipeline run scenario.
_scenario: 2026-04-07 daily digest run with 5 items, 2 events, provenance scoring, representative selection, alert gating, and provenance rendering.

PIPE-01_provenance_scoring._proof: T1 item outranks T4 item for the same event after provenance modifier application.

items.title: 36Kr: OpenAI 发布 GPT-5
items._note: Higher final_score (0.80) but T4 decay drops adjusted_score below T1 item (0.60 < 0.792)

PIPE-03_representative_selection._proof: T1 item wins representative selection for evt-gpt5. T3 and T4 items excluded from digest pool (runtime only).
PIPE-03_representative_selection._note: Non-representative items excluded from digest pool for this run only. digest_eligible field NOT modified.

PIPE-02_alert_gating._proof: Event-level suppression and tier-aware threshold both demonstrated.

scenario_a_event_suppression.reason: Step 0: event evt-gpt5 already alerted today (1 prior alert in alert_log)

scenario_b_t4_threshold.title: 36Kr: New AI Regulation Draft
scenario_b_t4_threshold.reason: Step 0A: T4 item importance 0.88 < T4 threshold 0.92

scenario_c_t1_passes.reason: Step 0A: T1 item importance 0.88 >= standard threshold 0.85

PIPE-04_provenance_rendering._proof: Digest output shows tier, original-source attribution, and provenance chain correctly.

rendered_lines: OpenAI announced the release of GPT-5...
来源: OpenAI Blog | 信源层级: 直接来源 | 新闻 | 重要性: 0.88
入选依据: importance | 配额: core | 证据: importance_score=0.88; topic_weight=0.9; event_boost=0.5
core_focus_example._note_no_original_source: original_source_name == source_name, so 原始来源 line is omitted
core_focus_example._note_no_chain: provenance_chain.length == 1 (single hop), so 溯源链 line is omitted

rendered_lines: - **某聚合新闻标题** -- 一句话摘要 (36Kr | 聚合转载)
溯源链: Reuters (直接来源) -> TechCrunch (原创报道) -> 36Kr (聚合转载)
compact_example_with_chain._note: original_source_name (Reuters) != source_name (36Kr), and chain.length == 3, so both lines render

PIPE-05_weekly_discovery_report._proof: Weekly report includes all four discovery subsections.

newly_enabled.reason: All 5 gates passed: frequency 7/7d, quality t1_ratio 0.85, uniqueness 2 exclusive events, age 5 days, not previously enabled

watchlist.gap: 需 5次/7天命中, 当前 3次
